facebook.caption: With a 4.8/5 rating from 331 reviews, CHAO Cafe & Local Taste on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is clearly doing something right. This cozy spot blends good coffee with local Vietnamese flavors, making it a great place to slow down, sip something cold, and get a genuine taste of everyday Phu Quoc life. Whether you stop in for a morning pick-me-up or a lazy afternoon break, it fits the mood perfectly. Practical tip: it sits in Khu Phố 7, so drop the address into Google Maps before you head out.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the cups land on the table and you will understand why locals keep coming back. CHAO Cafe & Local Taste serves up coffee and Vietnamese bites in a setting that feels lived-in and real. No tourist-trap vibes here, just good drinks and good energy on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.

instagram.caption: 4.8 stars, 331 happy visitors, and one very good reason to wander down Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. CHAO Cafe & Local Taste is the kind of place that rewards curious travelers who step off the main strip.
instagram.video_caption: Steam rising, local flavors landing, and a laid-back vibe that is hard to leave. CHAO Cafe & Local Taste is your next Phu Quoc pit stop.

tiktok.caption: This little cafe on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo has 331 reviews and a 4.8 rating for good reason. CHAO Cafe & Local Taste is the real deal. #PhuQuoc #VietnamCafe #LocalEats #TravelVietnam
